island-hopping-experience.subtitle: Inhaca · Portuguese Island · Santa Maria Beach
island-hopping-experience.description: An epic adventure through Mozambique's most beautiful islands — snorkelling on pristine coral reefs, white-sand beaches and an authentic beachside barbecue.
detailText: Set sail on an unforgettable journey through the paradise islands of Maputo Bay. Glide across crystal-clear waters and discover the wild beauty of Inhaca Island, the enchanting Portuguese Island and the stunning Santa Maria Beach — three remarkable destinations in one extraordinary day.

Our local guides lead you through vibrant coral reefs teeming with tropical fish, sea turtles and manta rays. At midday, feast on an authentic Mozambican barbecue — freshly grilled fish, tiger prawns and seafood prepared right on the beach.
Perfect for families, couples and groups looking to experience the very best Mozambique has to offer — nature, flavour and adventure in one unforgettable day.
includes: Barbecue with fresh fish, prawns and seafood
highlights: Snorkelling on coral reefs with unique biodiversity
Pristine white-sand beaches and turquoise waters
Experienced guides with deep local knowledge
Small groups for a more intimate experience
importantInfo: Minimum 4 participants for departure confirmation.
Children under 3 travel free (no separate seat).
Tour subject to favourable weather conditions — free rescheduling.
Meeting point: Maputo Marina at 07:30.
We recommend SPF 50+ sunscreen and sunglasses.

portuguese-island-bbq.name: Portuguese Island — Beach BBQ
portuguese-island-bbq.subtitle: Snorkelling & Barbecue on Portuguese Island
portuguese-island-bbq.description: A perfect escape to Portuguese Island with snorkelling on coral reefs and a delicious beachside seafood barbecue.
detailText: Portuguese Island is a breathtaking white sandbank surrounded by some of the finest coral reefs in Mozambique. On this exclusive trip, we sail directly to the island for a morning of snorkelling, sunshine and pure relaxation.

The highlight is our authentic Mozambican barbecue: freshly grilled fish, tiger prawns, squid and seafood prepared by our team right on the beach, with the Indian Ocean as your backdrop — a gastronomic experience you will never forget.
Ideal for those with limited time who still want to experience the essence of Mozambique's islands.
includes: Barbecue with fresh fish, prawns and seafood
highlights: Authentic beachside barbecue with fresh seafood
Half-day experience — perfect when time is short
importantInfo: Minimum 4 participants for departure confirmation.
Tour subject to weather conditions.
Meeting point: Maputo Marina at 08:00.
Not available on Mondays.

portuguese-island-farol.name: Portuguese Island & Lighthouse Beach
portuguese-island-farol.subtitle: Two iconic destinations in one adventure
portuguese-island-farol.description: A unique combination: snorkelling on Portuguese Island and a visit to the historic Lighthouse Beach on Inhaca Island, with its iconic 19th-century lighthouse.
detailText: This tour combines two of Maputo Bay's most photogenic destinations: Portuguese Island with its untouched coral reefs, and Lighthouse Beach on Inhaca Island, marked by the historic lighthouse built in 1893.

After snorkelling on Portuguese Island, we sail to Lighthouse Beach for a guided tour of the lighthouse and a picnic on the beach with stunning ocean views — history, nature and breathtaking scenery in one tour.
A perfect experience for lovers of history and nature looking for something different from the usual island visits.
includes: Guided tour of the historic lighthouse
highlights: Visit to the iconic Inhaca Lighthouse (1893)
Snorkelling on Portuguese Island coral reefs
Panoramic picnic overlooking the Indian Ocean
importantInfo: The lighthouse climb can be physically demanding — appropriate footwear recommended.
Minimum 4 participants.
Subject to weather conditions.
Meeting point: Maputo Marina at 07:30.

santa-maria-snorkeling.name: Santa Maria Beach — Snorkelling & BBQ
santa-maria-snorkeling.subtitle: One of Mozambique's most beautiful beaches
santa-maria-snorkeling.description: A full day at the stunning Santa Maria Beach with guided snorkelling on coral reefs, a beachside barbecue and the purest peace of the Indian Ocean.
detailText: Santa Maria Beach is considered one of the most untouched beaches in Mozambique. With fine white sand, crystal-clear waters and coral reefs at your doorstep, it is the perfect destination for a day of total disconnection and pure nature.
Our tour includes a guided snorkelling session on the local reefs, full of diverse marine life, followed by an authentic Mozambican barbecue prepared on the sand by our team.
The afternoon is entirely yours — dive, relax, explore the beach or simply absorb the incomparable beauty of Mozambican nature.
includes: Barbecue with fresh fish and seafood
highlights: Pristine white-sand beach with turquoise waters
importantInfo: Subject to weather conditions.
Minimum 4 participants.
Meeting point: Maputo Marina at 07:00.
The beach has no infrastructure — bring everything you need.

inhaca-cultural.name: Inhaca Island — Cultural Experience
inhaca-cultural.subtitle: Discover life and culture on Inhaca Island
inhaca-cultural.description: A genuine immersion in the culture and community of Inhaca Island — village tour, local market, wild beaches and a traditional Mozambican lunch.
detailText: Inhaca Island is far more than paradise beaches. It is a living community with a rich history, colourful markets and unique local cuisine. This tour takes you inside the real life of the island.

Begin with a guided tour of Inhaca's main village, where you will meet local fishermen, visit the craft market and understand the way of life of this coastal community. The afternoon is spent on the island's quietest beaches.
Lunch is served at a local eatery with traditional Mozambican dishes — matapa, fried carapau and coconut rice — an authentic culinary experience you won't find in any city restaurant.
highlights: Guided tour of an Inhaca fishing village
Local market with crafts and traditional goods
Quiet beaches rarely visited by tourists
Authentic interaction with the local community
importantInfo: Please respect local customs and traditions during the village visit.
Modest clothing recommended for the village visit.
Subject to weather conditions.
Meeting point: Maputo Marina at 08:00.

maputo-bay-sunset-cruise.subtitle: The most beautiful sunset over Maputo Bay
maputo-bay-sunset-cruise.description: Sail across Maputo Bay as the sun sets and witness one of the world's most stunning sunsets, aboard our comfortable boat.
detailText: Few things are more beautiful than watching the sun sink below the horizon over Maputo Bay from the water. Our Sunset Cruise takes you on a leisurely 3-hour sail across the bay, with champagne, drinks and snacks included.
On board, enjoy the sea breeze, live music and perfect company for an unforgettable afternoon. The cruise passes along the city's shores, offering unique views of Maputo's skyline at dusk.
Ideal for couples, groups of friends or anyone looking to celebrate a special moment in style.
highlights: Unique views of the Maputo skyline
importantInfo: Departures available Wednesday to Sunday.
Advance booking recommended — limited seats.
Light clothing and a thin jacket recommended (evening breeze).
Meeting point: Maputo Port at 17:00.

sunset-dinner-dj.subtitle: Premium dinner & live DJ on the Indian Ocean
sunset-dinner-dj.description: A premium evening at sea: a 3-course chef dinner with fresh seafood, live DJ and the most incredible sunset over Maputo Bay. Adults only.
detailText: Our Sunset Dinner & DJ Cruise is the most exclusive experience we offer. On board our premium boat, a Mozambican chef prepares a 3-course dinner featuring the freshest seafood of the day, accompanied by a carefully selected wine list.
A resident DJ provides the perfect soundtrack for the evening — from ambient tunes at sunset to livelier beats after dark, creating a unique atmosphere on the bay's waters.
Adults only (16+). Maximum 20 guests per departure to guarantee the exclusivity of the experience.
includes: 1 bottle of wine per couple (or equivalent)
highlights: Chef dinner with fresh Indian Ocean seafood
Live DJ in an exclusive setting
importantInfo: Adults only (16+).
Maximum 20 guests per departure — advance booking essential.
Dress code: Smart casual.
Available Fridays and Saturdays.
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before.

xefina-island-cruise.subtitle: Sunset party cruise to Xefina Island
xefina-island-cruise.description: A party at sea! A lively cruise to Xefina Island with music, barbecue, drinks and the best sunset over Maputo Bay.
detailText: Xefina Island is a well-kept secret of Maputo Bay — a historic island with deserted beaches and a unique atmosphere. Our Party Cruise takes you there at the end of the day for an experience that combines adventure, food and celebration.

On board, lively music, a seafood barbecue and an open bar create the perfect atmosphere for an unforgettable afternoon. On the island, there is time to explore the beach, swim in the warm waters and watch the sunset in a truly special setting.
Perfect for groups of friends, bachelor/bachelorette parties or any celebration that deserves an extraordinary backdrop.
includes: Drinks (beer, soft drinks, water during the cruise)
highlights: Visit to the historic and mysterious Xefina Island
Music and party atmosphere on board
importantInfo: Available weekends and public holidays.
Minimum 8 participants for confirmation.
Ideal for groups — discounts for groups of 15+.
Meeting point: Maputo Port at 14:45.

ponta-douro-day-trip.name: Ponta D'Ouro — Full Day
ponta-douro-day-trip.subtitle: Wild dolphins, snorkelling and golden beaches in southern Mozambique
ponta-douro-day-trip.description: Ponta D'Ouro is famous for its wild dolphins and pristine golden beaches. A day of ocean adventure, snorkelling and nature in southern Mozambique.
detailText: Ponta D'Ouro, 120km south of Maputo, is one of the most beloved destinations for Mozambicans and international visitors alike. Famous for its golden beaches, crystal-clear waters and one of the world's largest resident dolphin populations.

Our day trip includes a boat excursion to swim with wild dolphins in their natural habitat, snorkelling on coastal reefs and free time on the paradisiacal beaches. Lunch is served at a local beachfront restaurant.
A 2-hour drive from Maputo that feels like travelling to another world — nature, ocean and authenticity.
highlights: Swimming with wild dolphins in their natural habitat
Snorkelling on Ponta D'Ouro's coastal reefs
Pristine golden beaches with towering dunes
Fresh seafood lunch at a beachfront restaurant
importantInfo: Passport or national ID required for travel to the south.
Swimming with dolphins is not guaranteed — depends on animal behaviour.
Tour subject to weather and sea conditions.
Departure from Maputo at 06:00 — punctuality required.

macaneta-day-trip.subtitle: Lagoon, mangroves and wild beaches 30 minutes from Maputo
macaneta-day-trip.description: Macaneta is the perfect escape from Maputo — a narrow strip of land between the ocean and the lagoon with wild beaches, mangroves and fresh fish.
detailText: Macaneta is a narrow peninsula just 30 minutes from Maputo, separated from the mainland by the Incomáti River. With wild ocean-facing beaches on one side and the calm lagoon on the other, it is a unique and accessible destination.
Our day trip includes the river boat crossing, a guided mangrove walk with a local guide and a long beach day with a fresh fish lunch at a typical local restaurant.
Perfect for anyone wanting to escape the city without a long journey.
includes: Local guide for the mangrove walk
highlights: Scenic boat crossing of the Incomáti River
Fresh fish and seafood in true local style
importantInfo: Available every day of the week.
Minimum 4 participants.
Macaneta beach has strong currents — swim with caution.
Meeting point: Maputo at 08:30.

bilene-day-trip.name: Bilene — São Martinho Lagoon
bilene-day-trip.subtitle: Mozambique's most serene lagoon, 2 hours from Maputo
bilene-day-trip.description: São Martinho Lagoon in Bilene is Mozambique's most popular calm-water beach — perfect for families with children and lovers of kayaking and windsurfing.
detailText: Bilene, 180km north of Maputo, is home to São Martinho Lagoon — a saltwater lagoon separated from the ocean by a narrow strip of sand. Its calm, crystal-clear waters make it the safest and most family-friendly beach destination in Mozambique.
Our day trip includes private return transport, lagoon access and lunch at one of the waterside restaurants. Kayaks, windsurfs and other water equipment can be hired on site (extra cost).
A perfect day for families with children, thanks to the calm, shallow waters with no dangerous currents.
highlights: Calm, safe waters — perfect for children
Kayaking and windsurfing available on site
importantInfo: Kayak and equipment hire not included in the price.
Ideal for families with children — calm and safe waters.
Paved road — comfortable journey.
Meeting point: Maputo at 07:00.

tofo-beach-trip.name: Tofo Beach — Whale Sharks & Mantas
tofo-beach-trip.subtitle: Mozambique's most famous diving destination
tofo-beach-trip.description: Tofo is the world capital of whale sharks and giant manta rays. Two days of diving, snorkelling and paradise beaches in Inhambane.
detailText: Tofo Beach in Inhambane is internationally recognised as one of the world's best diving destinations. Its reefs are home to whale sharks, giant manta rays, sea turtles, dolphins and a breathtaking diversity of marine life.

Our 2-day package includes return transport from Maputo, one night at a beachfront guesthouse, two guided snorkelling or diving trips (with the possibility of encountering whale sharks depending on the season) and all meals.
A transformative experience for ocean and marine wildlife lovers.
includes: Return transport from Maputo (flight or air-conditioned bus)
highlights: Giant manta rays on Tofo's reefs
Tofo Beach — one of Mozambique's most beautiful
importantInfo: Whale shark sightings most likely from June to November.
Minimum 2 participants.
Children under 8 not recommended for the diving trips.
Scuba diving requires PADI certification (courses available locally).
Free cancellation up to 72 hours before.

vilanculos-trip.name: Vilanculos & Bazaruto Archipelago
vilanculos-trip.subtitle: The ultimate paradise destination in northern Mozambique
vilanculos-trip.description: Vilanculos and the Bazaruto Archipelago form one of the most spectacular destinations on the African continent — golden dunes, pristine coral reefs and a sea of shifting colours.
detailText: The Bazaruto Archipelago, off the coast of Vilanculos, is considered one of the most beautiful marine parks in Africa. With islands of golden dunes, untouched coral reefs and extraordinary marine life, it is the dream destination of any ocean lover.
Our 3-day package includes return flights to Vilanculos, beachfront lodge accommodation, a boat excursion to the Bazaruto Archipelago with snorkelling, dugong (sea cow) sightings and all meals.
A premium experience that fully justifies the journey.
includes: Boat excursion to the Bazaruto Archipelago
importantInfo: Flights are subject to availability and may vary in price.
Minimum confirmation 7 days before departure.
Dugong sightings are not guaranteed.
Package is customisable — contact us for more information.

safari-kruger-park.subtitle: Africa's greatest national park — Big 5 in one day
safari-kruger-park.description: A full-day safari in Africa's largest national park. Spot elephants, lions, giraffes, zebras and more — with return to Maputo the same day.
detailText: Kruger National Park is Africa's largest and most famous safari destination, spanning over 20,000km² of savannah teeming with the Big 5 and 147 other mammal species. Our full-day trip departs Maputo at 05:00, entering through the Crocodile Bridge Gate for morning and afternoon game drives.

Choose your safari vehicle: the closed 4x4 with pop-up roof (recommended for private groups and protection from wind and dust) or the classic open safari vehicle with elevated seats and 360° visibility for photography.
With a professional safari guide, you will explore the park's roads in search of elephants, lions, giraffes, zebras, buffalo, antelopes and hundreds of bird species.
highlights: Closed 4x4 safari vehicle — comfortable and private
Open safari vehicle option with 360° photography visibility
Elephants, lions, giraffes, zebras and buffalo in the wild
Return to Maputo the same day

itinerary.title: Departure from Maputo
itinerary.body: Pick-up at hotel or meeting point. Transfer towards the Mozambique – South Africa border.

itinerary.title: Border Crossing
itinerary.body: Assistance with border formalities. Continue towards Kruger National Park.

itinerary.title: Arrival at Kruger National Park
itinerary.body: Entry through Crocodile Bridge Gate. Beginning of the safari experience.

itinerary.title: Morning Safari Drive
itinerary.body: Explore the park with a professional guide. Possibility to see: elephants, lions, giraffes, zebras, buffalo, antelopes and many bird species.

itinerary.title: Rest Stop at Camp
itinerary.body: Stop at a rest camp inside the park. Lunch included, short rest and photos.

itinerary.title: Afternoon Safari
itinerary.body: Continue exploring other areas of the park with wildlife viewing and scenic stops.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Maputo
itinerary.body: Arrival in Maputo and end of the excursion.

categories.name: Open Safari Vehicle — 16,500 MZN / person
items: Elevated seats for better wildlife viewing

importantInfo: Valid passport required for South Africa.
Neutral clothing recommended.
Lunch is included in the package.
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before.
Subject to availability confirmation.

safari-parque-maputo.name: Maputo Special Reserve
safari-parque-maputo.subtitle: Elephants, hippos and flamingos 1 hour from Maputo
safari-parque-maputo.description: Maputo Special Reserve is home to elephants, hippos, flamingos and unique mangrove wetlands — a spectacular safari just 1 hour from the capital.
detailText: Maputo Special Reserve (formerly the Elephant Reserve) is an elephant paradise — with over 700 individuals roaming free. But it is not just elephants: hippos, lions, zebras, flamingos and over 300 bird species inhabit this natural paradise just 1 hour from Maputo.
Our day trip includes 4x4 transport, a guided game drive, a visit to the reserve's coastal area with pink flamingos and a picnic by the lagoon.
An accessible and unforgettable safari, perfect for families and those with limited days in Maputo.
includes: Guided game drive with certified ranger
Binoculars for use during the tour
highlights: Pink flamingos on the reserve's coastline
Certified ranger with deep local knowledge
importantInfo: Comfortable neutral clothing recommended.
Insect repellent essential.
The reserve is recovering — wildlife sightings are not guaranteed but very likely.
Meeting point: Maputo at 06:30.

tour-reino-eswatini.name: Eswatini — Cultural Experience
tour-reino-eswatini.subtitle: Culture, tradition and nature in the Kingdom of Eswatini
tour-reino-eswatini.description: Discover the rich culture of the Kingdom of Eswatini through an authentic and unforgettable experience. This one-day tour combines tradition, nature, and local craftsmanship.
detailText: The Kingdom of Eswatini, nestled between South Africa and Mozambique, is a fascinating destination combining stunning natural scenery with vibrant, authentic culture.

The tour includes a visit to Mantenga Cultural Village, the spectacular Mantenga Falls, an authentic Swazi cultural experience, a stop at Swazi Candles and lunch with soft drinks at Mlilwane Wildlife Sanctuary.
Suitable for families and children, with moderate walking and a professional tour guide included throughout.
highlights: Lunch and soft drinks at Mlilwane Wildlife Sanctuary

itinerary.title: Departure from Maputo
itinerary.body: Pick-up in Maputo and departure towards Eswatini. Approximately 206 km | 3 hours (including border procedures and stops).

itinerary.title: Mantenga Cultural Village & Falls
itinerary.body: Visit to Mantenga Cultural Village with an authentic Swazi cultural experience. Explore the spectacular Mantenga Falls.

itinerary.title: Lunch at Mlilwane Wildlife Sanctuary
itinerary.body: Lunch and soft drinks at Mlilwane Wildlife Sanctuary — included in the package.

itinerary.title: Swazi Candles & Local Crafts
itinerary.body: Stop at the famous Swazi Candles factory to discover local craftsmanship and pick up unique souvenirs.

importantInfo: Departure location: Maputo.
Travel distance & time: approximately 206 km | 3 hours (including border procedures and stops).
A valid passport is required for entry into Eswatini.
Some nationalities may require a visa — please check in advance.
Guests should allow time for border formalities.
What to bring: passport, comfortable walking shoes, hat & sunscreen, camera, light jacket.
Full-day tour. Suitable for families and children. Moderate walking involved. Operates in most weather conditions.

whale-watching.name: Whale Watching
whale-watching.subtitle: Humpback whales in Maputo Bay (Jun–Nov)
whale-watching.description: Between June and November, hundreds of humpback whales migrate through Maputo Bay. One of the most spectacular wildlife experiences on the planet.
detailText: Maputo Bay is one of the world's finest locations for humpback whale watching. Between June and November, these magnificent creatures — which can reach 16 metres in length — migrate to the warm Indian Ocean waters to give birth and raise their calves.

Our whale watching excursion is conducted by marine biologists and experienced navigators, using quiet vessels and responsible observation protocols to avoid disturbing the animals. The sighting probability during peak season exceeds 95%.
A transformative experience that very few will ever be fortunate enough to have.
highlights: Marine biologist on board for interpretation
Over 95% sighting probability during peak season
Possible sightings of breaches, tail slaps and calves
importantInfo: Available June to November only.
Sightings not guaranteed but probability is very high during the season.
Not recommended for people with severe seasickness — bring preventative medication.
The boat complies with all approach rules to protect the whales.
Departures at 06:30 — punctuality required.

deep-sea-fishing.subtitle: Marlin, tuna, dorado and wahoo in the deep Indian Ocean
deep-sea-fishing.description: Deep sea fishing on the Indian Ocean — blue marlin, yellowfin tuna, dorado and wahoo. A pure adrenaline adventure for anglers of all levels.
detailText: The Indian Ocean off Maputo is one of Africa's finest sport fishing grounds. The warm, deep waters are home to blue marlin, yellowfin tuna, dorado, wahoo and barracuda — species that anglers travel from around the world to catch.

Our sport fishing boat is equipped with trolling lines, high-performance rods and all consumables. The skipper and crew have years of experience on Maputo's waters and always find the best fishing spots.
The price is per boat (up to 6 people) — ideal for groups of friends or fishing families.
excludes: Fish filleting and cooking (available on request)
highlights: Fishing for blue marlin, tuna, dorado and wahoo
Fully equipped boat with professional gear
Skipper with 15+ years' experience on the Indian Ocean
Up to 6 people per boat — ideal for groups
importantInfo: Price is per boat — up to 6 people.
Catch & release fishing available and encouraged for marlin.
Not recommended for people with severe seasickness.
Minimum booking 3 days in advance.
The caught fish belongs to the client — processing included.

private-boat-rental.name: Private Boat Rental
private-boat-rental.subtitle: The boat, the sea and the destination you choose
private-boat-rental.description: Hire our boat for the full day and choose your own destination — islands, bay, fishing, snorkelling or simply exploring the Indian Ocean at your own pace.
detailText: Our most flexible option: hire the boat for the full day and plan your own itinerary. Whether it is a private island, fishing, snorkelling, a party at sea or simply exploring the bay — the boat and crew are entirely at your disposal.
The crew includes an experienced skipper and a deck assistant. The boat is equipped with safety gear, a cool box, a sound system and capacity for 8 people.
Ideal for birthdays, bachelor/bachelorette parties, corporate events or simply an extraordinary day on the water.
highlights: Total flexibility of itinerary and destination
Skipper with 10+ years on Maputo waters
Perfect for birthdays and special events
Sound system and cool box included
importantInfo: Minimum booking 48 hours in advance.
Itinerary is agreed with the skipper the evening before.
Adverse weather conditions may alter the route.
Food and drinks are the client's responsibility.
For groups over 8 people, contact us for special arrangements.

maputo-city-tour.subtitle: History, architecture and culture of Mozambique's vibrant capital
maputo-city-tour.description: Uncover Maputo's secrets on a guided tour of its historic monuments, colonial neighbourhoods, century-old gardens and the city's best viewpoints.
detailText: Maputo is one of Africa's most fascinating capitals. Founded by the Portuguese in the 18th century, the city combines unique colonial architecture with a vibrant contemporary energy. Our historical City Tour takes you to the city's most iconic landmarks.

Visit the Iron House designed by Gustave Eiffel, the impressive Natural History Museum with its taxidermied elephants, the Municipal Central Market, the historic Maputo Fortress and the century-old avenue gardens.
The tour is led by local guides who know the stories behind every monument — an educational, engaging and deeply Mozambican experience.
includes: Water and snacks at the end
highlights: The Iron House by Gustave Eiffel
Natural History Museum with taxidermied elephants
Century-old gardens and unique colonial architecture
importantInfo: Tour available every day except Monday (museums closed).
Comfortable clothing and walking shoes recommended.
The Natural History Museum may occasionally be closed for works.
Meeting point: Client's hotel or agreed location.

machangulo-beach-lodge.subtitle: Premium lodge on the Machangulo Peninsula
machangulo-beach-lodge.description: Machangulo Beach Lodge is a premium beachfront lodge on the Machangulo Peninsula — ocean-view bungalows, an infinity pool and the finest sunsets on the Mozambican Indian Ocean.
detailText: Machangulo Beach Lodge is one of the most exclusive lodges in the Maputo region. Situated on the stunning Machangulo Peninsula, its wooden and thatch bungalows are positioned directly on the beach, with private terraces overlooking the Indian Ocean.
The infinity pool merges visually with the ocean horizon, creating one of Mozambique's most photogenic settings. The restaurant serves fresh fish and seafood daily, caught by local fishermen at dawn.
Access is by boat from Maputo (1 hour), ensuring the privacy and seclusion that make this experience truly special.
highlights: Infinity pool overlooking the Indian Ocean
Daily fresh-catch seafood at the restaurant
importantInfo: Check-in: 14:00 | Check-out: 11:00
Access by boat — transfer not included in base price.
Advance booking recommended — limited capacity.
Free cancellation up to 72 hours before.

mamas-lodge.subtitle: Authentic lodge on Inhaca Island with ocean views
mamas-lodge.description: Mama's Lodge is a hidden gem on Inhaca Island — family atmosphere, genuine Mozambican cuisine and breathtaking views of the Indian Ocean.
detailText: Mama's Lodge has been run by the same family for two generations and represents the finest Mozambican hospitality. Situated on Inhaca Island, the lodge offers comfortable rooms with ocean views and cuisine that is, quite simply, unforgettable.

The 'Mama' prepares daily dishes such as matapa, groundnut chicken, fried carapau and coconut rice — recipes passed down through generations. The panoramic terrace is the perfect spot to watch the sun rise over the ocean while enjoying breakfast.
An authentic accommodation experience, far from large hotel chains — for those who want to feel Mozambique from the inside.
excludes: Meals (available on request: +9,300 MZN/adult for breakfast, lunch and dinner)
highlights: Panoramic views over the Indian Ocean
importantInfo: Check-in: 13:00 | Check-out: 11:00
Price per adult/night without meals: 14,900 MZN | With meals (B+L+D): 24,200 MZN.
2 nights: Adults 24,400 MZN without meals / 32,400 MZN with meals.
Children (4–9 yrs) 1 night: 9,500 MZN without meals / 14,500 MZN with meals.
Children (4–9 yrs) 2 nights: 14,900 MZN without meals / 19,800 MZN with meals.
Limited capacity — advance booking essential.

manico-camp.subtitle: Beachside glamping on Inhaca Island
manico-camp.description: Manico Camp offers beachside accommodation on Inhaca Island — with a beachfront restaurant, pool, breakfast included and a Santa Maria Beach tour.
detailText: Manico Camp is the most adventurous accommodation option on Inhaca Island. Positioned directly on the beach with a beachfront restaurant, it offers a pure nature experience without sacrificing basic comfort.
The package includes breakfast, return boat transfer and a tour to the stunning Santa Maria Beach with snorkelling on coral reefs.
Ideal for groups of friends, adventurers and everyone looking for a different and memorable accommodation experience on Inhaca Island.
highlights: Adventure experience at an accessible price
importantInfo: Shared outdoor bathroom.
Return boat transfer Maputo–Inhaca included.
1 night: Adults 9,500 MZN | Children (4–9 yrs) 7,200 MZN.
2 nights: Adults 13,500 MZN | Children (4–9 yrs) 6,900 MZN/night.
Daily departures.

villa-martins.subtitle: All-inclusive exclusive villa on Inhaca Island
villa-martins.description: Villa Martins is the premium Inhaca Island experience — pool, Wi-Fi, restaurant, laundry and boat transfer included, with a Santa Maria Beach tour.
detailText: Villa Martins is the crown jewel of Inhaca Island accommodation. With a pool, restaurant, Wi-Fi and laundry service, it offers every comfort in a paradisiacal beachside setting.
The package includes breakfast, return boat transfer from Maputo, a Santa Maria Beach tour and snorkelling — all organised so you have nothing to worry about.
Ideal for families, groups of friends or special celebrations that deserve an extraordinary setting on Inhaca Island.
importantInfo: 1 night: Adults 11,400 MZN | Children (3–12 yrs) 5,700 MZN.
2 nights: Adults 16,400 MZN | Children (3–12 yrs) 8,200 MZN.
Boat transfer included (departing from Maputo Marina).
Advance booking required — limited availability.
Free cancellation up to 72 hours before.

mad-marlin.subtitle: Beachfront lodge on Inhaca Island with pool and self-service meals
mad-marlin.description: Mad Marlin is a beachfront lodge on Inhaca Island — pool, self-service meals, boat transfer, breakfast and a Santa Maria Beach tour all included.
detailText: Mad Marlin is situated directly facing the sea on Inhaca Island, offering a relaxed stay with everything you need to fully enjoy the island.
The package includes breakfast, return boat transfer from Maputo, a Santa Maria Beach tour and snorkelling on coral reefs — no logistics stress.
A perfect option for those who want to experience Inhaca Island up close, with comfort and nature right at the door.
excludes: Lunch and dinner (self-service available on site)
importantInfo: 1 night: Adults 10,500 MZN | Children (3–9 yrs) 6,500 MZN.
2 nights: Adults 14,500 MZN | Children (3–9 yrs) 8,500 MZN.
Check-in: 14:00 | Check-out: 11:00
Return boat transfer Maputo–Inhaca included.
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before.

khanimambo-lodge.subtitle: "Thank you" in Shangaan — genuine hospitality on Inhaca Island
khanimambo-lodge.description: Khanimambo — 'thank you' in Shangaan — is a boutique lodge on Inhaca Island with a small pool, near the restaurant and beach, with transfer and Santa Maria tour included.
detailText: Khanimambo, meaning 'thank you' in Shangaan, embodies the essence of Mozambican hospitality. This lodge on Inhaca Island was designed to make every guest feel truly welcome.
The package includes accommodation, return boat transfer from Maputo, breakfast, a Santa Maria Beach tour and snorkelling — with daily departures.
Located near the restaurant and beach, with a small pool to relax in the shade of the island.
importantInfo: 1 night: Adults 10,900 MZN | Children (7–9 yrs) 6,500 MZN.
2 nights: Adults 14,500 MZN | Children (3–9 yrs) 8,800 MZN.
Check-in: 14:00 | Check-out: 11:00
Return boat transfer Maputo–Inhaca included.
Daily departures. Free cancellation up to 48 hours before.
